'''javumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrogenicity|iatrogenicity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrogenicity|iatrogenicity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| javumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævimith|jævimith]] || [[word:jævimij|jævimij]] || [[word:jævimish|jævimish]] || [[word:jævimi|jævimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javuvumuth|javuvumuth]] || [[word:javuvumuj|javuvumuj]] || [[word:javuvumush|javuvumush]] || [[word:javuvumu|javuvumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javumuth|javumuth]] || [[word:javumuj|javumuj]] || [[word:javumush|javumush]] || [[word:javumu|javumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javufmuth|javufmuth]] || [[word:javufmuj|javufmuj]] || [[word:javufmush|javufmush]] || [[word:javufmuf|javufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javumuthu|javumuthu]] || [[word:javumuju|javumuju]] || [[word:javumushu|javumushu]] || [[word:javumuku|javumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javumuth|javumuth]] || [[word:javumuj|javumuj]] || [[word:javumush|javumush]] || [[word:javumu|javumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javumuthul|javumuthul]] || [[word:javumujul|javumujul]] || [[word:javumushul|javumushul]] || [[word:javumukul|javumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javumuthuthu|javumuthuthu]] || [[word:javumujuju|javumujuju]] || [[word:javumushushu|javumushushu]] || [[word:javumuku|javumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javumuthun|javumuthun]] || [[word:javumujun|javumujun]] || [[word:javumushun|javumushun]] || [[word:javumukun|javumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javumuthuoro|javumuthuoro]] || [[word:javumujuoro|javumujuoro]] || [[word:javumushuoro|javumushuoro]] || [[word:javumukuoro|javumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
